ÐÐ¾Ð·Ð²Ð¾Ð»Ñ ÑÐµÐ±Ðµ Ð¿Ð¾Ð³ÑÑÑÑÐ¸ÑÑ â Ð° Ñ ÑÑÐ´Ð¾Ð¼, Ð´Ð°Ð¶Ðµ ÐµÑÐ»Ð¸ Ð½Ðµ Ð¼Ð¾Ð³Ñ Ð¾Ð±Ð½ÑÑÑ Ð¿ÑÑÐ¼Ð¾ ÑÐµÐ¹ÑÐ°Ñ. Ð¢Ñ ÑÐ¿ÑÐ°Ð²Ð¸ÑÑÑÑ, ÐºÐ°Ðº ÑÐ¿ÑÐ°Ð²Ð»ÑÐ»Ð°ÑÑ Ð²ÑÐµÐ³Ð´Ð°. Ð¯ Ð² ÑÐµÐ±Ñ Ð²ÐµÑÑ Ð¸ Ð¾ÑÐµÐ½Ñ ÑÐµÐ±Ñ Ð»ÑÐ±Ð»Ñ.
letters.music: // Cloudflare Worker — посредник между блокнотом и GitHub. // Токен GitHub хранится в переменной окружения (Secret) на стороне Cloudflare // и никогда не попадает в код, который видит браузер.  const GH_OWNER  = "Silent-Enigma-HQ"; const GH_REPO   = "My_beloved"; const GH_BRANCH = "main"; const GH_PATH   = "data/notebook.json";  const CORS = {   "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",   "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, OPTIONS",   "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type" };  export default {   async fetch(request, env) {     const url = new URL(request.url);      if (request.method === "OPTIONS") {       return new Response(null, { headers: CORS });     }      const API = `https://api.github.com/repos/${GH_OWNER}/${GH_REPO}/contents/${GH_PATH}`;     const ghHeaders = {       "Authorization": `Bearer ${env.GH_TOKEN}`,       "Accept": "application/vnd.github+json",       "User-Agent": "notebook-worker"     };      if (url.pathname === "/load" && request.method === "GET") {       const res = await fetch(`${API}?ref=${GH_BRANCH}&t=${Date.now()}`, { headers: ghHeaders });       if (res.status === 404) {         return new Response(JSON.stringify({ notFound: true }), {           status: 200, headers: { ...CORS, "Content-Type": "application/json" }         });       }       if (!res.ok) {         return new Response(JSON.stringify({ authError: true, status: res.status }), {           status: 200, headers: { ...CORS, "Content-Type": "application/json" }         });       }       const file = await res.json();       const decoded = atob(file.content.replace(/\n/g, ""));       return new Response(decoded, { headers: { ...CORS, "Content-Type": "application/json" } });     }      if (url.pathname === "/save" && request.method === "POST") {       const bodyText = await request.text();        let sha = null;       const getRes = await fetch(`${API}?ref=${GH_BRANCH}&t=${Date.now()}`, { headers: ghHeaders });       if (getRes.ok) {         const cur = await getRes.json();         sha = cur.sha;       }        const putBody = {         message: "обновление блокнота",         content: btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(bodyText))),         branch: GH_BRANCH       };       if (sha) putBody.sha = sha;        const putRes = await fetch(API, {         method: "PUT",         headers: { ...ghHeaders, "Content-Type": "application/json" },         body: JSON.stringify(putBody)       });        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ ok: putRes.ok }), {         status: 200, headers: { ...CORS, "Content-Type": "application/json" }       });     }      return new Response("Not found", { status: 404, headers: CORS });   } };
